route_to_terra: This token bridges from neutron to Terra via IBC.
First acquire the source asset on neutron — route unverified.

Then IBC transfer it to your Terra address (e.g. via Keplr cross-chain transfer).
On neutron this asset is: factory/neutron1ffus553eet978k024lmssw0czsxwr97mggyv85lpcsdkft8v9ufsz3sa07/astro
warnings: This guide was auto-derived from on-chain bridge metadata, not verified by a human.
The bridge path is correct, but the consumer route to acquire the source asset is unknown.
If you find a working on-ramp, please contribute to acquisition_guides.json.

cosmos_chain_registry.name: USDC
cosmos_chain_registry.description: USDC is a fully collateralized US Dollar stablecoin developed by CENTRE, the open source project with Circle being the first of several forthcoming issuers.

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire USDC on Noble — either via Circle CCTP (from Ethereum, Polygon, Base, Avalanche, Solana, etc.) or directly on Noble
2. IBC send to Terra via Noble → Terra channel
warnings: Keplr search for 'USDC' shows DOZENS of variants across Ethereum, Polygon, Solana, Sei, Osmosis, etc. — only Noble-issued USDC routed via IBC is correct for Terra.
Do NOT use Polygon USDC, Solana USDC, or Ethereum-bridged USDC directly — those don't exist on Terra as the same address.
If unsure: use Skip.go and select 'send to Terra: USDC'. Skip.go will handle the bridging in one tx and select the correct path.
alternative_routes: Skip.go can handle the full bridge in one transaction — select destination Terra and asset USDC.

cosmos_chain_registry.name: Eureka Bridged PAX Gold (Terra)
cosmos_chain_registry.description: PAX Gold bridged via Eureka on Cosmos Hub and relayed to Terra (phoenix-1) over IBC.

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire PAX Gold (PAXG) on Ethereum (Coinbase, Kraken, Paxos directly, etc.)
2. Use Skip.go: select 'Send to Terra: PAXG' — same Eureka IBC route as wBTC.atom
3. Token arrives on Terra as PAXG at ibc/0EF56305...
warnings: PAXG is gold-backed (1 PAXG ≈ 1 troy ounce of physical gold held by Paxos). It carries real-world counterparty risk distinct from a pure crypto asset.
Same bridge path as wBTC.atom (Ethereum → Cosmos Hub via Eureka → Terra). If wBTC.atom worked for you, PAXG should follow the same pattern.
alternative_routes: Manual route via wallets if Skip.go doesn't list PAXG: PAXG on Ethereum → Cosmos Hub (Eureka bridge) → IBC to Terra
acquisition.notes: Bridge data shows source_chain=ethereum, route mirrors wBTC.atom. CG verification matched 'pax-gold' via bridge-trace fallback (Stage 7c).

override.notes: Wormhole-bridged Ethereum WETH on Terra.
Creda Finance's wrapped WBTC on Terra. Minted natively against collateral on Creda — not a bridge. Uses generic WBTC logo as visual reference.

terra1jjvy4s4tyw3ym6s3wk896up6jthvha9vtw.notes: Creda Finance's wrapped WBTC on Terra. Minted natively against collateral on Creda — not a bridge. Uses generic WBTC logo as visual reference.

route_to_terra: 1. Visit creda.money to deposit approved collateral and mint wBTC.creda.a
2. Minted token is delivered directly to your Terra address — no bridge involved
3. Acquisition mechanics, fees, and collateral requirements are per Creda's product (not an IBC bridge)
warnings: This is NOT a bridged wBTC — it's a synthetic wBTC issued by Creda Finance natively on Terra. Treat it as a Creda product with Creda's specific collateralization risks.
Do not confuse with wBTC.atom (true bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Cosmos Hub), wBTC.axl (Axelar bridge), or wBTC.osmo (Osmosis bridge).
Acquisition route is via Creda's frontend; council members have not personally tested the mint flow.
acquisition.notes: Confirmed cw20 (not IBC) — minted natively on Terra by Creda. Single-asset stake in TLA's 'single' bucket.

override.notes: Axelar-bridged ETH (WETH) on Terra.

Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Cosmos Hub (Eureka IBC route). The '.atom' suffix refers to the bridge path through Cosmos Hub, not a Cosmos-native asset. Acquire via Skip.go (Send to Terra → WBTC) or manually via Eureka bridge.
override.warning: Multiple wBTC variants exist on Terra: wBTC.atom (this — Ethereum via Cosmos Hub), WBTC.axl (Ethereum via Axelar), WBTC.osmo (Ethereum via Osmosis). They are SEPARATE Terra addresses for the same underlying Ethereum WBTC. TLA pools whitelist specific variants — confirm address before depositing.

ibc/88386AC48152D48B34B082648DF836F97550.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Cosmos Hub (Eureka IBC route). The '.atom' suffix refers to the bridge path through Cosmos Hub, not a Cosmos-native asset. Acquire via Skip.go (Send to Terra → WBTC) or manually via Eureka bridge.

route_to_terra: 1. Acquire WBTC on Ethereum (any exchange or onchain swap to 0x2260...)
2. Use Skip.go: select 'Send to Terra: WBTC' — Skip handles the Eureka IBC bridge route via Cosmos Hub
3. Token arrives on Terra as wBTC.atom (at ibc/88386AC4...) — Astroport's UI labels this simply 'WBTC' without the .atom suffix
warnings: TLA uses wBTC.atom SPECIFICALLY — not wBTC.axl (ibc/05D29988...) or wBTC.osmo (ibc/CF57A83C...). These are all separate Terra addresses for the same underlying Ethereum asset but bridged via different paths.
Astroport's wallet view labels this as just 'WBTC' (no suffix). The Terra address is the only stable identity — confirm before depositing.
Eris UI's '.atom' label refers to the bridge path (via Cosmos Hub), not a Cosmos-native asset.
alternative_routes: Direct route: WBTC on Ethereum → bridge to Cosmos Hub via Eureka → IBC to Terra. Skip.go automates this whole path.
acquisition.notes: Route documented based on bridge metadata (Skip.go + Eureka IBC). Council deposit test would upgrade to verified=true.

override.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Osmosis. Distinct from wBTC.atom (Cosmos Hub route) and WBTC.axl (Axelar route).
override.warning: Variant trap: WBTC.osmo appears in LUNA-WBTC.osmo LP (Skeleton Swap variant) and in the WBTC.axl-WBTC.osmo LP. Not interchangeable with wBTC.atom — they have separate Terra addresses despite the same underlying Ethereum asset.

ibc/CF57A83CED6CEC7D706631B5DC53ABC21B7E.notes: Bridged WBTC from Ethereum via Osmosis. Distinct from wBTC.atom (Cosmos Hub route) and WBTC.axl (Axelar route).

override.notes: ATOM from Cosmos Hub via standard IBC. Logo from cosmos/chain-registry cosmoshub folder.

ibc/27394FB092D2ECCD56123C74F36E4C1F9260.notes: ATOM from Cosmos Hub via standard IBC. Logo from cosmos/chain-registry cosmoshub folder.

route_to_terra: 1. Hold ATOM on a Cosmos Hub address (e.g. via Keplr)
2. IBC transfer from Cosmos Hub → Terra using Keplr's built-in cross-chain transfer
3. Token arrives on Terra as ATOM at ibc/27394FB0...
4. Works in both Astroport AND Skeleton Swap LPs within TLA
warnings: Skeleton Swap's API labels this as 'ATOM on Dungeon' at a different IBC denom (ibc/C3988DBA...) — that label is misleading. The actual SS pool contracts hold the standard ATOM at ibc/27394FB0... (verified by depositing standard-IBC ATOM successfully into both DEX's LUNA-ATOM LPs).
alternative_routes: Skip.go select 'Cosmos Hub → Terra → ATOM' — handles the IBC transfer in one click
acquisition.notes: Empirically tested 2026-06-02: same denom accepted by Astroport's ATOM-LUNA LP and Skeleton Swap's ATOM-LUNA LP. Cross-DEX verification (17 pairs) confirmed all TLA pools use this exact ATOM denom.

terra1hwxg6s732eparz3ys7sa4t5f64ngpd2w8s.label: Eris Global Config
terra1hwxg6s732eparz3ys7sa4t5f64ngpd2w8s.notes: Eris's root config contract. Holds the address book for the entire Eris stack (asset_gauge, voting_escrow, asset_compounder, bribe_manager, all four asset_staking buckets). The tla-registry cron queries {all_addresses: {}} on this contract as Q1 of every run to discover every other contract address it needs. If this returns null, the whole catalog run aborts.

terra1yqv0af22675wlcmgflxk4ve07vt8qlm999.description: Council operations wallet. Separate from the main treasury — used for council-level expenses and operations.

_meta.description: Known protocols on Terra. Each protocol entry describes the protocol and lists associated contracts/tokens (which can also be auto-derived).

TLA.label: The Liquidity Alliance
TLA.description: The TLA (formerly Eris Amplifier Gauges) is the on-chain governance + LP staking system this dashboard tracks. aDAO is a council member.

Eris.label: Eris Protocol
Eris.description: Liquid staking + governance protocol. Operates the ve3 stack underlying TLA. LSTs include ampLUNA, arbLUNA, ampROAR, ampCAPA.

Astroport.label: Astroport
Astroport.description: Cross-chain DEX. Most active DEX on Terra. Hosts the majority of TLA pools as PCL (concentrated), XYK, and stable pools.

SkeletonSwap.label: Skeleton Swap
SkeletonSwap.description: Terra DEX. Hosts some TLA pools (typically xyk). Sometimes pools exist on BOTH Astroport AND SS for the same pair — variants can split liquidity.

DAODAO.label: DAODAO
DAODAO.description: DAO tooling. aDAO and allied DAOs use DAODAO contracts for governance + treasury management.

BackBoneLabs.label: BackBone Labs
BackBoneLabs.description: Protocol building bLUNA + BackBone Marketplace (BBL Marketplace) on Terra.

Solid.label: Solid Protocol
Solid.description: Decentralized stablecoin protocol on Terra. Issues SOLID. CAPA is governance/utility token.

PhoenixDirective.label: Phoenix Directive
PhoenixDirective.description: Active TLA participant. Regularly adds bribes to TLA pools.

Skip.label: Skip.go
Skip.description: Cross-chain transfer / routing. Used to bridge tokens to Terra (e.g. wBTC.atom via Eureka IBC route).

Polytone.label: Polytone
Polytone.description: Cross-chain messaging protocol built by the DAODAO team. Polytone Notes allow Terra-side DAOs to send execute messages to addresses on other Cosmos chains via Polytone Listeners.

_meta.description: Defines valid categories + subtypes for the catalog. Edit this to add new categories or subtypes — both the cron and the viewer page respect this file.

amplp_tokens.description: Eris vault tokens that wrap an LP position

validators.description: Reserved — not populated yet. Future use for terravaloper... addresses.

protocols.description: Cross-cutting tag — orthogonal to category. A protocol owns/operates a contract or token.

flags.description: Cross-cutting status flags. Any category can carry any flag.

cosmos_chain_registry.note: IBC asset metadata; many common tokens (e.g. ATOM) absent from terra-2 list

astroport_pools.note: Astroport pool data — indexes assets via active trading pairs

skeletonswap_pools.note: SkeletonSwap pool data — only assets in current SS pools

coingecko_list.note: CG /coins/list with platforms — used for independent CG-mapping verification

tokens.note: LP token — no DEX returned a name. Check Astroport / SS reachability.
